scripts.bench:assert: npm run build && BENCH_SCENARIOS=mixed BENCH_ITERATIONS=3 BENCH_WARMUP_SECONDS=10 BENCH_DURATION_SECONDS=30 BENCH_COOLDOWN_MS=10000 node benchmark-harness/run-benchmarks.js && node perf/bench/assert.js
scripts.bench:micro: npm run build && BENCH_ONLY_MICRO=1 node benchmark-harness/run-benchmarks.js
